description:
You are a medical billing administrator at a French general practice using MedinTux. Generate a reference report of CCAM (Classification Commune des Actes Médicaux) medical procedure codes from the 'CCAMTest' MySQL database (localhost, user: root, no password) for an upcoming CPAM audit. Save a schema summary listing all table names and their columns to /home/ga/ccam_schema.txt. Additionally, create a formatted report at /home/ga/ccam_report.txt using the following exact structure:

Line 1: CCAM Procedure Code Report - MedinTux CCAMTest Database
Line 2: Total procedure codes: <N>
Line 3: Number of tables: <N>
Line 4: (blank line)
Line 5: === Sample Procedures (first 20 alphabetically) ===
Line 6-25: <CODE> | <DESCRIPTION> (one per line, for the first 20 codes ordered by code)
Line 26: (blank line)
Line 27: === Schema Summary ===
Line 28+: <table_name>: <row_count> rows (one line per table)
